claims.quote: The Innovations Funding in Education program is one of the most impactful Academy programs designed to support junior faculty across UCSF to engage in curricular innovation and scholarship
claims.claimText: Innovations Funding program supports UCSF junior faculty in curricular innovation and scholarship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Funding program targeted at junior faculty for educational scholarship — faculty-development, not pre-residency USCE.

claims.quote: International Fellowships in Medical Education funds for faculty from schools of medicine abroad to gain access to educational opportunities in the US. Fellows study aspects of medical education that have the potential to improve and expand medical education programs in their home country institutions and departments.
claims.claimText: FAIMER International Fellowships in Medical Education listed as external funding opportunity for foreign medical school faculty to access US educational opportunities — not a UCSF-offered USCE program.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page lists external faculty funding/fellowship opportunities for medical educators; audience is faculty, not pre-residency trainees or residents.
claims.limitations: Listed as a third-party external funding link, not a UCSF-offered program; not USCE.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof
